description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image as the default image and defines a single stage called production. Add a production job that runs on the ruby:latest image, is of type deploy, and is limited to the master branch. In this job execute the following shell commands in order: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby-dev make, ruby --version, gem install dpl, and make dpl HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_API_KEY -s. The job deploys the application to Heroku using the dpl tool.
